content: started recently last month i think. which would be the best team for me right now? also who would be better to pull for? should i wait for a characters banner? i was thinking of pulling for pollux tbh. also who should i pull for standard?  i'll take any and every advice

I can't quite understand what kind of teams they slot into, and what kind of role they play.
I read their cards and did their tryout stages, but I still am kind of lost as to who you would use them with/for what reason.
I get that Pollux is probably a DPS, and Castor looks like a decent support for multi hitting DPS characters, but other than that I don't really know what they are, who they would work with, etc.
Also how dependant are they on their copies? I have just about enough pulls to guarantee one, but not really sure If I should pull on them or save for later.

I've been look at tier list and stuff, but base on what I've been seeing most of the teams are built on base on meta. Right now I frankly am not sure on who to actually pull to comfortably breeze through some content.

I am also not sure who to pull on standard pull. I probably wasted most of it pulling on some stuff. I would also like to have an advice on what to actually do with standard banner.

I haven't used timeless my account is 7 days old and I've just been playing the game casually.

I would also like to ask what do I have to do in the game other than "become strong" because I have no knowledge about the game I just really like deck building game that I played it (It's overally fun though).
thread_title: Game Advice, Pulling, and Team Building

content: For limited characters like 24/murphy/ lucy etc that are added to the standard banner, is it ever worth it to pull on their limited banners? Or should I just pull on the standard banner until I get them? I'm like almost 600 pulls into blue and haven't gotten a single murphy. Should I still just be rolling blue until I get a copy?  Or should I be going into Wheel jail now? I've gotten every other blue character to E3 at the very least already. Another example is that I've heard 24 is really good and is on the standard banner in Chaos, but It seems like the limited characters on the standard banner rarely appear. So if I want 24 is it better to invest standard pulls into the yellow banner until I get a copy, or is it better to start wheel jail and roll on a 24 re-run banner? Here is my current roster.
thread_title: Pulling on limited characters already in standard pool.
